utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 top-level items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 keys. Now check if each is fully specified with costs: 1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with costs; both specified with plan names and monthly costs; preventive_care is extra but costs provided; total_health_cost provided. This meets requirement. 2) property_coverage: home/contents insurance with costs; 'home_contents' specified with monthly cost; total provided. This meets requirement. 3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs; premium_travel and adventure_coverage provided with costs and total. Meets requirement. 4) additional_services: any enhancement services with costs; includes preventive care and adventure travel duplication but costs provided plus total. Meets requirement. 5) total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; monthly cost, previous cost, monthly and annual savings provided; effective date and status added. Meets requirement. All 5 items are present and include required cost details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final coverage plan: Physical health plan is 'LifeFirst Standard Physical Health Plan' which corresponds to primary_health_coverage.physical_health 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (rating 8). Mental health plan is 'LifeFirst Standard Mental Health Plan' corresponding to primary_health_coverage.mental_health 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (rating 8). Home contents is 'InsurePlus Standard Home Content Coverage' matching property_protection.home_content 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' (rating 7). Travel includes 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' which directly matches mobility_coverage.travel_insurance 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' (rating 10). 'Adventure Travel Coverage' matches travel_enhancement_services 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (rating 8). 'Preventive Care Package' corresponds to health_enhancement_services 'Preventive Care Package' (rating 8).
